name: mini-browser-remote-control-system
description: Local-only remote Chromium browser control system using Next.js, Express, Socket.IO, Dockerode, and Playwright.

scripts.install:all: npm.cmd install --prefix backend && npm.cmd install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm.cmd run dev --prefix backend" "npm.cmd run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm.cmd run build --prefix backend && npm.cmd run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm.cmd run start --prefix backend" "npm.cmd run start --prefix frontend"
